zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Arundell於1250年出生在英國可瓦爾博德明時，她的父親Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory32歲，母親Eva Roche22歲。她於1270年與Marcus de Whalesborough在英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Arundell于1250年出生在英国可瓦爾博德明时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory32岁，母亲Eva Roche22岁。她于1270年与Marcus de Whalesborough在英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Arundell was born in 1250, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, was 32 and her mother, Eva Roche, was 22. She married Marcus de Whalesborough in 1270, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1309, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Arundell est née en 1250, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eva Roche, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Marcus de Whalesborough en 1270, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1309, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Arundell 1250 in Bodmin, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory 32 und ihre Mutter Eva Roche 22. Sie hat 1270 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England Marcus de Whalesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1309 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Arundell è nata il nel 1250 nel Bodmin, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eva Roche, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Marcus de Whalesborough nel 1270, nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1309, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Arundellが1250年にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Treloryは32歳，母Eva Rocheは22歳であった。1270年にイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウでMarcus de Whalesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Arundell(이)가 1250년 영국 코른월 보드민에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva Roche(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1270년 영국 코른월 화알스버루그h에서 Marcus de Whalesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Arundell nasceu em 1250, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eva Roche, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Marcus de Whalesborough em 1270, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1309, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Arundell родилась в 1250 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eva Roche, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Marcus de Whalesborough в 1270 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1309 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Arundell nació en 1250, en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eva Roche, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Marcus de Whalesborough en 1270, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1309, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
